title: kaori.analysis.tier.started
description: F-033 Multi-tier Analysis — fired by ai-orchestrator when a tier run is queued. Producer: services/ai-orchestrator/multi_tier/service.py. Consumers (future): tier-quota tracker, ops dashboard.

analysis_run_id.description: analysis_runs.id — UUID string. Joins back to the row for the templates / source_ids / question.

tier.description: Matches analysis_runs.tier — drives consumer routing (basic vs intermediate use different downstream rollups).

scope.description: Data scope — informs cost rollup (cross-workspace runs are tracked separately).

framework.description: Framework code for intermediate / advanced tiers. NULL for basic.
